title: H.P. Lovecraft - The Terror Within
original_title: Il mistero di Lovecraft - Road to L.
overview: 1997: A student of folklore named Andrea Roberti disappears after hypothesizing a possible link between the horror literature of H.P. Lovecraft and the dark folk tales of the Po Delta, a mysterious and remote part of northern Italy.
